common.command_failed: command failed, check logs for details
common.admin_channel_only: admin commands can only be used in channel {channel_id}
help.title: available commands:
help.intro: Commands are grouped by required permission level. Only commands available to your current role are shown below.
help.footer: Tip: command usage examples below already use your current prefix.
profile.title: profile
recharge.title: recharge completed
admin.addadmin.denied: permission denied: only super administrators can add administrators
store.gen_card.title: recharge cards generated
store.export_cards.success: exported {count} recharge cards to your dm
store.export_keys.success: exported product key data to your dm. sheets: {sheet_count} | rows: {count}
store.add_product.title: product created
store.add_product.field.name: Product Name
store.import_file.pending_started: please upload a .txt or .csv file within {seconds} seconds
store.import_file.pending_replaced: the previous upload task was replaced, please upload a .txt or .csv file within {seconds} seconds
store.import_file.web_pending_started: a one-time upload page has been sent to your dm
store.import_file.web_pending_replaced: the previous web upload task was replaced and a new one-time upload page was sent to your dm
store.import_file.web_disabled: web upload mode is not enabled on this bot
store.import_file.web_dm_failed: failed to send the upload link to your dm
store.import_file.invalid_mode: invalid import mode, use attachment or web
store.import_file.mode_mismatch_web: this import task is using web mode, open the link from your dm to upload the file
store.import_file.cancel_success: the pending import upload has been cancelled
store.import_file.cancel_empty: there is no pending import upload to cancel
store.import_file.no_pending_upload: you have no pending import task, run /import_file first
store.import_file.expired: the upload window has expired, run /import_file again
store.import_file.wrong_channel: please upload the file in the same channel where you started the import task
store.import_file.missing_attachment: please attach a .txt or .csv file when using this command
store.import_file.invalid_attachment: please upload a valid .txt or .csv file, current file: {file_name}
store.import_file.download_failed: failed to download the attachment, please try again
store.import_file.success: ✅ batch import completed. product id: {product_id} | parsed total: {parsed_total} | inserted: {inserted_count} | skipped duplicates: {skipped_duplicates}
store.products.title: product list:
store.products.summary: {count} products available. Use the buttons below to buy or subscribe for restock.
store.products.item: id={id} name={name} price={price} stock={stock} status={status} description={description}
store.products.tip_in_stock: Tip: `Buy Now` purchases 1 item by default. `Buy {quantity}` places a batch order, subject to current stock and your balance.
store.products.tip_single_stock: Tip: only 1 item is left in stock right now. Use `Buy Now` to purchase it.
store.products.tip_out_of_stock: Tip: this product is out of stock. Use `Subscribe` to get notified after restock.
store.products.truncated: Only the first {shown} / {total} products are shown in cards right now.
store.subscribe.title: restock subscription created
store.subscribe.success: you will be notified when product {product_id} ({product_name}) is restocked
store.unsubscribe.title: restock subscription cancelled
store.unsubscribe.success: restock notifications for product {product_id} ({product_name}) have been cancelled
store.restock_notify.title: restock alert
store.restock_notify.body: the product you subscribed to is back in stock: {product_id} ({product_name})
store.buy.success_footer: the purchased keys have been sent to your dm
store.refund.title: refund completed
error.card_used: card code has already been used
error.amount_count_positive: amount and count must be positive integers
error.price_positive: price must be a positive integer
error.quantity_positive: quantity must be a positive integer
error.product_in_stock: this product is currently in stock, available: {stock}
error.product_already_subscribed: you have already subscribed to this product
error.product_not_subscribed: you do not have an active restock subscription for this product
error.refund_target_not_found: refund target not found for this user and key
error.refund_already_processed: this key has already been refunded or voided
error.payment_not_enabled: payment is not enabled or not configured
error.payment_amount_integer: payment amount must be an integer
error.payment_amounts_empty: at least one valid payment amount is required
error.payment_amounts_unconfigured: payment amounts have not been configured by an administrator
error.payment_amount_not_allowed: this payment amount is not allowed; use a preset amount or an admin-approved custom range
error.payment_type_invalid: invalid payment type, supported: alipay, qqpay, wxpay
error.payment_callback_mismatch: payment callback data does not match the local order
error.dm_requires_target: direct message requires target_id or chat_code
command.add_key.description: Add a sellable key to a product.
command.add_keys.description: Batch add sellable keys to a product.
command.addadmin.description: Grant admin role to a user.
command.buy.description: Buy one or more product keys and receive them in DM.
command.del_card.description: Delete a recharge card by code.
command.export_cards.description: Export recharge cards to your DM as an Excel file.
command.export_keys.description: Export product keys to your DM as an Excel file.
command.hello.description: Reply with a simple hello world message.
command.import_file.description: Import sellable keys by channel attachment or one-time web upload.
command.pay_amounts.description: Show allowed recharge amounts and payment methods.
command.recharge.description: Redeem a recharge card and add balance.
command.refund.description: Refund a sold key and mark it as void.
command.subscribe.description: Subscribe to restock notifications for an out-of-stock product.
command.unsubscribe.description: Cancel the restock notification subscription for a product.
payment.guide.title: Payment Guide
payment.guide.intro: Choose one allowed amount, then click a payment method button to create the order directly.
payment.amount_card.title: Recharge {amount}
payment.amount_card.body: Click one of the buttons below to create a `{amount}` payment order directly.
payment.created.title: Payment order created
payment.created.footer: Open the payment page and complete the payment. The balance will be credited automatically after callback confirmation.
payment.notify.title: Payment completed
payment.submit.redirecting: Redirecting you to the payment gateway. If nothing happens, use the button below.
web.import.page_intro: Upload the .txt or .csv file you want to import.
web.import.session_missing: Import session not found or expired.
web.import.mode_mismatch: This upload session does not use web mode.
web.import.success: Import completed successfully. Product ID: {product_id} | Parsed: {parsed_total} | Inserted: {inserted_count} | Skipped duplicates: {skipped_duplicates}
web.import.notify_body: Your batch import uploaded through the web page has completed. Product ID: {product_id} | Parsed: {parsed_total} | Inserted: {inserted_count} | Skipped duplicates: {skipped_duplicates}
